data.body: Investigation confirms bug is resolved. Three signal/timeout paths tested: (1) internal timeout during test — saves state via _save_state_and_resume, (2) SIGURG during test execution — signal handler writes state atomically via python3 tempfile+replace, (3) SIGURG during bash runner with completed tests — preserves completed test list. Key fixes: SIGURG trap handler (lines 68-125), internal timeout check (lines 508-538), state file isolation (df511361), interrupted test re-run (57eca700).
